title: DTS Enabler
_comment_permissions: This web app does NOT itself hold root. All privileged work is delegated to the Homebrew Channel exec service (luna://org.webosbrew.hbchannel.service/exec), which the app calls from its own JS service. The app therefore only needs the standard permissions to talk to Luna. On a rooted TV, luna access is unrestricted; on retail firmware these luna calls would be rejected by ACG, which is expected: this app is meaningless without root.
_comment_icon: icon.png must be a real 80x80 PNG for on-TV display. A vector source (icon.svg) is provided; convert it with e.g. `rsvg-convert -w 80 -h 80 icon.svg > icon.png` or any tool before packaging. See README > Icon.
